title: Operator Sprint Brief - Project Incubator Day 5
status: Local-first CLI milestone is ready for operator review.
evidence: JSON and markdown inputs both generate self-contained HTML briefs.
Demo artifacts live under demo/ and .codexbot_preview/.
Tests cover parsing, model shaping, and HTML rendering.
risks: Markdown parser intentionally supports simple heading-based notes only.
Remote publication is not configured in this phase.
nextMilestone: Add optional theme presets and richer input validation after local milestone acceptance.
